data.current_description: Validates a session token to check if the user is authenticated.
data.description_suggestion: Validates an existing session token to verify user authentication status. Accepts a session token as input and returns validation status along with token metadata. Returns a 200 response with validation details if the token is valid, or an error response if invalid or expired. Does not modify any state.

data.current_description: Creates a new session token by authenticating with email and password.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new session token by authenticating with email and password credentials. Accepts email and password in the request body and returns a session token upon successful authentication. The returned token can be used for subsequent API requests. Returns a 201 response with the session token and token metadata on success, or an authentication error if credentials are invalid.
